Interface INetworkDiagramEdit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control standard editing operations on the network diagram.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F5BB20B3-5D3B-4F87-893A-D7349C483C0A")]
public interface INetworkDiagramEdit
